analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet claims that actors in the US are deliberately creating and spreading disinformation against China, implying a hostile intent from the US toward China. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported: it portrays the US as deliberately spreading disinformation and positions China as a victim of US hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Not supported: no claims about China's cooperative or peaceful international behavior. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not supported: no historical references or resilience themes. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not supported: no defense of China’s political system or domestic values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not supported: no claims about governance successes or development achievements. CH6 (China is interesting in culture/nature/heritage) — Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1.
